status_reason: Live retrieval metrics require running the production-equivalent search path (embed-query + search_legal_corpus_dual/metric + reranker) against the frozen gold set. No DB credentials and no reachable EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT are available in this environment (only feature-flag secrets). Metrics NOT computed this session.

thresholds.p95_latency: below documented product timeout budget (dual stmt_timeout 60s; vector-search x-statement-timeout 8000ms; embed-query 20s)

separation: Results must be split by language (HY/RU/EN/FR), query type, status scope, content domain, exact identifier vs semantic, and legally-reviewed vs engineering-only. Engineering and legal-reviewed results are NEVER averaged into one score.
threshold_justification: Recall@10>=0.90 and exact-provision>=0.85 are strict because legal retrieval must surface the controlling authority for actionable legal questions. Inactive-law leakage=0 and citation corruption=0 are zero-tolerance because either causes unsafe legal advice. No-answer precision>=0.90 prevents over-refusal. p95 must sit under the product timeout budget to avoid user-facing search failures.
prior_engineering_eval_note: Historical engineering-eval numbers exist in AUDIT_REPORTS/artifacts/prompt19_2_*.json. Per the non-negotiable rule, stale reports are NOT treated as current PASS and are not transcribed as live metrics here.
